title: Vertical Motions
intro: Move through a file fast: `gg` jumps to the first line, `G` to the last line. `{` and `}` jump between paragraphs (blank lines).

exercises.instruction: Jump to the first line with `gg`.
Jump to the last line with `G`.
Jump forward to the blank line between the functions with `}`.
hints: `}` jumps to the next blank line (paragraph boundary).

exercises.instruction: Now from the bottom, jump back to that blank line with `{`.
hints: `{` jumps to the previous blank line.
